message:
test(oracle): add 11 conformance test functions: window, mixed queries, CTE chains, DML subqueries

New conformance oracle tests covering:
- Window ranking: ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK with PARTITION BY
- Window aggregates: running SUM/COUNT/AVG, SUM/MIN/MAX OVER ()
- Window LAG/LEAD with offset and default values
- Complex mixed: JOIN+GROUP BY+HAVING+ORDER BY+LIMIT combinations
- UPSERT edges: DO UPDATE with excluded, DO NOTHING
- Transaction/savepoint: nested savepoint ROLLBACK TO
- DML subquery: INSERT...SELECT+GROUP BY, DELETE with subquery, UPDATE correlated
- Conversion edges: typeof, CAST boundaries, numeric prefix, blob conversions
- Chained CTEs: multiple CTEs, CTE referencing CTE, CTE with aggregate

All 87 oracle tests pass (including 37 from concurrent agents). 0 mismatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
